_publications._publicationTitle: Validity and interexaminer reliability of a new method to quantify skin neurofibromas of neurofibromatosis 1 using paper frames.

_contextSnippet: The agreement between examiners, using the paper frame method, was better for individuals with <100 neurofibromas (maximum threshold of 10 neurofibromas) than for individuals with ≥100 tumors (maximum threshold of 42 neurofibromas), but these differences did not have clinical importance since there was an agreement of approximately 99%
details: Better agreement for patients with <100 neurofibromas (max threshold 10) vs ≥100 neurofibromas (max threshold 42), but differences not clinically important with ~99% agreement
